task: Prepare a non-advisory Samsung Electronics securities research question map using Graham-style evidence separation.
objective: Separate price, value, risk, and missing evidence before any conclusion.

deliverables.description: Markdown map of research questions separated into price, value, risk, and missing evidence.
JSON-style evidence checklist for filings, macro data, and owner-provided materials.
Countercheck memo that names downside cases and unsupported assumptions.

acceptance_criteria: Every conclusion must separate price, value, risk, and uncertainty.
No buy, sell, hold, or trade-execution instruction is allowed.
Missing data must be labeled instead of invented.
constraints: Do not give buy, sell, or hold instructions.
Cite public data requirements instead of inventing numbers.
data_sources: company filings supplied by the owner
